title: T.N.T.
why_this_song: T.N.T. by AC/DC (1975) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 4 times; first heard in: "Don't you start no fight"
Appears 3 times; first heard in: "'Cause I'm T.N.T. I'm dynamite"
Appears 3 times; first heard in: "T.N.T. and I'll win the fight"
Appears 3 times; first heard in: "T.N.T. I'm a power load"
Appears 3 times; first heard in: "T.N.T. I'm a power load"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "fight" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "fight" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "dynamite" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "dynamite" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: T.N.T. and I'll win the fight

exercises.prompt_en: The singer makes a claim or statement in this song. Do you agree with it? Use evidence from the lyrics to support your answer.
exercises.prompt_pt: O cantor faz uma afirmação nessa música. Você concorda? Use pelo menos um verso para defender sua resposta.

exercises.prompt_en: Which single word from this song do you think carries the most emotional weight, and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Qual palavra dessa música carrega mais peso emocional para você, e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: "T.N.T." was released in 1975. Do you think the themes in the song are timeless, or do they feel dated? Give one example from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: "T.N.T." foi lançada em 1975. Você acha que os temas da música são atemporais ou já parecem datados? Dê um exemplo do que ouviu.

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
